src/main/java/com/tickets/TicketsApplica.general_idea: Add Spring Retry support to the application context.

src/main/java/com/tickets/config/WebConf.general_idea: Replace deprecated allowedOrigins with allowedOriginPatterns to support credentials in Spring Boot 2.4+.
src/main/java/com/tickets/config/WebConf.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.4+ throws an IllegalArgumentException if allowCredentials is true and allowedOrigins contains '*' or multiple origins; allowedOriginPatterns is the required replacement.

src/main/java/com/tickets/config/WebConf.general_idea: Add PATCH to the list of allowed HTTP methods for CORS.
Expose all response headers in CORS configuration.
Increase CORS preflight cache duration from 3600 to 36000 seconds.
Refactor interceptor registration to use a dynamic list of excluded paths.

src/main/java/com/tickets/controller/Fac.why_exists: javax.servlet package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.servlet does not exist' on JDK 21/Spring Boot 3.

src/main/java/com/tickets/controller/Fac.general_idea: Remove imports of sun.net.www.protocol.http.HttpURLConnection which is an internal JDK API.
src/main/java/com/tickets/controller/Fac.why_exists: Internal sun.* packages are encapsulated and removed in newer JDKs (JDK 16+); code fails to compile with 'package sun.net.www.protocol.http does not exist'.
